name: Crab Stuffed Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and bone the chicken breasts; pound to flatten.
2. Sprinkle with a little salt and pepper.
3. Cook onion and celery in 3 tbsp butter until tender.
4. Remove from heat; add 3 tbsp white wine, crabmeat, and stuffing mix, and toss.
5. Divide mixture among the breasts and roll up, securing them.
6. Combine flour and paprika.
7. Coat chicken with the seasoned flour mixture.
8. Place in an 11" X 7" X 2" baking dish, drizzle with 3 tbsp melted butter.
9. Bake uncovered at 375°F for 1 hour.
10. Transfer to a platter.
11. Blend the Hollandaise sauce mix and milk; cook, stirring until thick.
12. Add remaining white wine and cheese, stirring until cheese melts.
13. Serve over chicken.
